channel.title: Failing to deploy on Vercel and Heroku
channel.description:
When i try to deploy to vercel it says ```error! Command "npm run build" exited with 1 vercel``` when i try to deploy to heroku it says ``` ! [remote rejected] master -> master (pre-receive hook declined)```
When i deploy to Github pages it then shows a frontity page. I have tried everything in the answers and frankly I've had enough. Not so good for a first try with frontity.

item.title: Failing to deploy on Vercel and Heroku
item.dc:creator: denis.siduna
item.description:
When i try to deploy to vercel it says error! Command "npm run build" exited with 1 vercel
when i try to deploy to heroku it says ! [remote rejected] master -> master (pre-receive hook declined)

When i deploy to Github pages it then shows a frontity page. I have tried everything in the answers and frankly I’ve had enough. Not so good for a first try with frontity.

Read full topic
item.source: Failing to deploy on Vercel and Heroku
